326 E Sangamon St, Petersburg, IL 62675, USA

City orchard, planted and maintained by the Petersburg tree committee. More types of fruit and nut trees growing but not yet producing heavily. Cherries and apples are usually plentiful. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-October.
